headline: Hubbell Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
summary: Shelton, CT, April 30, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HUBBELL REPORTS FIRST QUARTER 2026 RESULTS Q1 diluted EPS of $3.41; adjusted diluted EPS of $3.93 (up 16% y/y)Q1 net sales 11% (organic 8.2%; foreign exchange 0.6%; M&A 2.3%)Q1 operating margin 17.4%; adjusted operating margin 19.8% (up 110 bps y/y)Raising FY 2026 diluted EPS expected range to $17.45-$18.00; adj. diluted EPS of $19.30-$19.85 SHELTON, CT.
